05 — Misc

Misc — Todd Libby

5

Everything else

The pages that don't fit into a single column — projects, writing, accessibility, speaking, and the rest.

  • Projects →

    Side projects, portfolio work, and tools I've built — ZulkirBot, Groovemark, BranchFlow, and more.
  • Writing →

    Longer essays, articles, and pieces published outside the blog.
  • Accessibility →

    My accessibility statement, commitments, and how I approach inclusive design on this site and in my work.
  • Speaking & Podcast →

    22 conference talks, 2 workshops, 21 podcast and stream appearances from 2019 through 2025.
  • Elsewhere →

    Where to find me across the web — Bluesky, GitHub, Twitch, and everywhere else.
  • Uses →

    The hardware, software, and tools I use day to day for development and streaming.
  • Colophon →

    How this site is built — stack, fonts, hosting, and the decisions behind the design.
  • Privacy →

    What this site does and doesn't collect. Short version: not much.
